name: Rigged Recount Clerk
text:
Whenever a player calls for a recount, or whenever a player rolls a die you don't like, you may pay {1} to make them reroll it. (The carnival and the Mayor's office use the same fixers.)
Whenever you reroll a die this way, you create a Treasure token.
flavorText: She counted the ballots, the dice, and the snacks. All three came up short, somehow in her favor.
